issues.description: The evidence collection aborted with status 'partial_gate_abort', meaning critical verification signals (tests_run, coverage) are absent.
issues.suggestion: Ensure the environment is stable and re-run the verification pipeline.

issues.description: AC-005, AC-006, and AC-007 (null fields, malformed frontmatter handling, and single-task lookup) are not addressed in the implementation report.
issues.suggestion: Implement the missing logic for null fields, parse errors, and the positional TASK-ID argument.

issues.description: Test file is located at 'tests/test_task_status_json.py' instead of the required 'tests/unit/commands/test_task_status_json.py'.
issues.suggestion: Move the test file to the correct directory: tests/unit/commands/test_task_status_json.py

criteria_verification.notes: File exists with main() and guard.
Fixed key order and sorting implemented.
No evidence of null emission for missing fields.
No evidence of parse_error: true for malformed files.
No evidence of single-task lookup or exit code 1.
Wrong file path for unit tests.
Tests ran on wrong path; gathering_status is partial_gate_abort.

rationale: The turn is rejected because the evidence gathering was incomplete (partial_gate_abort), the test files were placed in the wrong directory, and several key functional requirements (AC-005, AC-006, AC-007) were completely omitted from the implementation report.
